provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, massive reptilian alien with dark green-grey scales scarred white from dozens of fights, a tall prominent crest ridge with an ornate metal crest-cap bolted directly to the bone, deep-set amber eyes under heavy scarred brow ridges, thick powerful tail held high, wearing heavy master-forged plate armor in dark bronze with tarnished gold trim and a crimson ceremonial cape split at the back for the tail, full house heraldry acid-etched across the chest plate, a belt of metal honor tokens clinking at the waist, a named two-handed blade with an ornate pommel at his side, the armor has intentional imperfections left by the house smith as a mark of handcraft
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Gold-bronze ornate plate, green cape, sword drawn. Massive presence. Forged armor with intentional imperfections. Leans fantasy but the material vocabulary is right.
